program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define Matter-first trace rules for RP00 control-plane records so tenant-scoped metadata remains Matter-traceable when client, document, finance, external-share, portal, or client-facing AI-output data is touched.
claude_questions: Do the M04 trace rules keep RP00 control-plane records tenant-scoped by default?
Do the rules require matter_id when client, matter, document, document-version, billing, finance, client-facing AI-output, external-share, or portal data is touched?
Do trace_fields include tenant_id, matter_id, client_id, document_id, and audit_event_ref with fail-closed or blocked-claim resolution policies?
Do all six control-plane entities have an explicit trace policy, including the conditional tenant trace for ClaudeReviewGate?
Do failure modes block missing Matter trace, cross-tenant mismatch, document-without-Matter resolution, and real-data fixtures before production_ready?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
